items.name: Ralph Lauren Patchwork-Stripe Jersey Rugby Shirt
items.description: Designed with all the hallmarks of a traditional rugby shirt, this version has an oversize, tunic-inspired silhouette made with cotton jersey. The patchwork-inspired motif features a mix of bold striped patterns and is embroidered with our signature Pony at the chest.
